title: Little World Tweaks
description: Smallish changes to the world of Minecraft
body:
Little World Tweaks is a datapack that changes some aspects of the worldgen in Minecraft.

Currently the following changes have been added:
- Diorite, granite, and dirt patches have been removed from most caves
- Andesite and tuff patches are more common
- Dripstone caves generate with granite, coarse dirt, and dirt patches
- Lush caves generate with diorite and calcite patches
- Pointed dripstone spikes are more common
- Trees are generally taller
- Fancy oak trees are more common
- Small jungle trees use the large jungle tree foliage placer
- Jungle bushes are less common

This datapack should be compatible with most mods, but it may not be compatible with other worldgen datapacks that modify biomes.
